Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. RubyGems Fracture Incident Report 45 upvotes, 4 comments
  2. From 300KB to 69KB per Token: How LLM Architectures Solve the KV Cache Problem 13 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. Tell HN: Chrome says "suspicious download" when trying to download yt-dlp 198 upvotes, 61 comments
  4. Open source CAD in the browser (Solvespace) 178 upvotes, 54 comments
  5. Accidentally created my first fork bomb with Claude Code 9 upvotes, 0 comments
  6. Axios compromised on NPM – Malicious versions drop remote access trojan 1628 upvotes, 639 comments
  7. Universal Claude.md – cut Claude output tokens 421 upvotes, 152 comments
  8. Combinators 95 upvotes, 28 comments
  9. Cohere Transcribe: Speech Recognition 64 upvotes, 17 comments
  10. Microsoft: Copilot is for entertainment purposes only 211 upvotes, 75 comments
  11. Google's 200M-parameter time-series foundation model with 16k context 265 upvotes, 98 comments
  12. GitHub Monaspace Case Study 60 upvotes, 20 comments
  13. Claude Code's source code has been leaked via a map file in their NPM registry 1282 upvotes, 676 comments
  14. Ollama is now powered by MLX on Apple Silicon in preview 557 upvotes, 281 comments
  15. Show HN: Forkrun – NUMA-aware shell parallelizer (50×–400× faster than parallel) 24 upvotes, 6 comments
  16. Show HN: Loreline, narrative language transpiled via Haxe: C++/C#/JS/Java/Py/Lua 26 upvotes, 8 comments
  17. Multiple Sclerosis 48 upvotes, 20 comments
  18. Artemis II is not safe to fly 745 upvotes, 475 comments
  19. Scotty: A beautiful SSH task runner 11 upvotes, 2 comments
  20. Audio tapes reveal mass rule-breaking in Milgram's obedience experiments 147 upvotes, 89 comments
  21. What major works of literature were written after age of 85? 75? 65? 85 upvotes, 54 comments
  22. Securing Elliptic Curve Cryptocurrencies Against Quantum Vulnerabilities [pdf] 13 upvotes, 4 comments
  23. Oracle slashes 30k jobs 613 upvotes, 515 comments
  24. The Claude Code Source Leak: fake tools, frustration regexes, undercover mode 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  25. South Polar Times 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  26. Claude Code users hitting usage limits 'way faster than expected' 151 upvotes, 119 comments
  27. A Love Letter to 'Girl Games' 91 upvotes, 68 comments
  28. Ask HN: Academic study on AI's impact on software development – want to join? 13 upvotes, 5 comments
  29. Good code will still win 22 upvotes, 24 comments
  30. RamAIn (YC W26) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 2:00am, 1 April 2026. Source here.
